---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement to the platform, pipeline, or tooling
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve, or what capability is missing? Why is it valuable?

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Affected Area

- [ ] Terraform infrastructure
- [ ] Databricks job / notebook (Bronze / Silver / Gold)
- [ ] Mock data generators
- [ ] CI/CD (GitHub Actions)
- [ ] Grafana / Observability
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or mockups here. If this aligns with the roadmap
(e.g. Model Serving, Delta Live Tables, PrivateLink), note that.
